scope: Cycle 21: Bug hunt C20 (0 bugs in JourneyMapDisplay.gd) + feat HubAntre faction panel + status bar
overall_assessment: Bug hunt C20: verified JourneyMapDisplay.gd (296 lines). _process() frame cost: queue_redraw() every frame is acceptable — max 12 visible nodes with simple shape drawing + scanlines. _classify_event() correctly handles String ('HEAL_LIFE:amount') and Dict ({'type':'HEAL_LIFE','amount':N}) effect formats using .to_upper() normalization. _draw_scroll_indicator uses '...' for both top/bottom indicators — cosmetic, not a bug. No critical/high/medium bugs found. Feature: HubAntre.gd gains 205 lines — faction reputation panel with 5 progress bars (faction-colored via CRT_PALETTE.faction_*), tier labels, status panel with Anam + Rune count. 29 total bugs fixed across 21 cycles.
